projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive portfolio website created using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It showcases my profile, skills, education, and projects using data loaded from a JSON file.

projects.title: Online Shopping Website
projects.description: A responsive online shopping website that displays products, allows users to browse different categories, and provides a simple shopping cart interface using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.title: Restaurant Menu Website
projects.description: A responsive restaurant menu website that showcases food and beverage items with prices, categories, and an attractive layout built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
